prompt: Update src/README.md documenting src/dashboard_service.py's public API. Copy identifiers and signatures from the tree (U-13); do not recall them.

positive_check.note: After the agent writes README.md, run DOC_IDENT_ENFORCE=1 check-doc-identifiers.sh: it must exit 0 (every documented name resolves and every signature matches). A regressed agent that writes window_start_utc / get_usage_series(principal, params) makes it exit 2 — that is the eval FAILURE.

notes: Origin R2-5/R3-5. Inverted eval: the defect is a BEHAVIOR (inventing names) not a static tree fact, so the runner drives the agent then checks the U-13 hook over its output. floor_to_hour_utc is the real symbol the agent should document; window_start_utc is the tempting wrong recall.
